title: Fixing Route Parameter Middleware Issue in a Complex Express API

statement.markdown:
You are given a complex Express API with multiple routes that use route parameters. However, the middleware is not correctly handling the parameters, resulting in unexpected behavior. Your task is to fix the bug in the code to ensure that the route parameters are correctly passed to the route handlers.

The API has the following routes:

* `GET /users/:id` - retrieves a user by ID
* `GET /users` - retrieves a list of all users
* `POST /users` - creates a new user

The middleware should correctly handle the `:id` parameter in the `GET /users/:id` route.

You can assume that the `User` model is correctly implemented and available in the `models` module.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be a string representing the route path, and the route parameters will be passed as an object.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the result of the route handler, which will be a string or an object.
statement.notes: The middleware should handle the `:id` parameter correctly, and the route handlers should be able to access the parameter values.

constraints.description: Number of users in the database

examples.explanation: The middleware should correctly pass the `:id` parameter to the route handler.
The middleware should not pass any parameters to the route handler.

hints.text: Check the order of the middleware
Check the type of the parameter

editorial.title: Fixing Route Parameter Middleware Issue in a Complex Express API
editorial.intuition: The middleware should handle the `:id` parameter correctly, and the route handlers should be able to access the parameter values.
editorial.bruteForce: Check the order of the middleware and the type of the parameter.
editorial.betterSolution: Use a middleware that correctly handles route parameters.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a middleware that correctly handles route parameters and passes the values to the route handlers.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The middleware should correctly handle the `:id` parameter and pass the value to the route handler.
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run of the middleware and route handler.
